output: Batch 7 completed. The obsolete in-tree RunPod implementation was removed from the orchestrator repo, the surviving `gpu_orchestrator.runpod` package was reduced to `startup_script` only, and the remaining tests/mocks were retargeted to the async `WorkerSpawnerAdapter` surface. Verification for this batch passed: the `create_runpod_client` / `RunpodClient` grep returned no matches, the `gpu_orchestrator.runpod.{api,client,lifecycle,storage,ssh}` import grep now only returns the intentional `startup_script` imports, and the touched Python files compiled cleanly.
deviations: Deleted `gpu_orchestrator/runpod_client.py` and updated `tests/test_module_import_coverage.py` as a necessary companion cleanup so the required `create_runpod_client` / `RunpodClient` grep gate could actually reach zero outside deleted legacy files.

Updated `tests/scripts/test_debug_services.py` in this batch even though it was not named explicitly in T8, because T6 changed the debug worker service from `create_runpod_client(...)` to `create_worker_spawner(...)` and the old monkeypatch would otherwise be stale.

task_updates.executor_notes: Deleted the obsolete in-tree RunPod implementation files from `gpu_orchestrator/runpod/`: `api.py`, `client.py`, `lifecycle.py`, `storage.py`, and `ssh.py`. Kept `gpu_orchestrator/runpod/startup_script.py` in place and trimmed `gpu_orchestrator/runpod/__init__.py` so it re-exports only `startup_script`. Deleted the obsolete tests exactly as intended: `tests/test_runpod_decomposition.py`, `tests/test_direct_runpod_lifecycle.py`, `tests/test_direct_runpod_storage.py`, and `tests/gpu_orchestrator/runpod/test_{api,client,lifecycle,storage}.py`. Kept `tests/gpu_orchestrator/runpod/test_startup_script.py`. Updated `tests/gpu_orchestrator/control/phases/test_lifecycle.py` so `host.runpod` is `Mock(spec=WorkerSpawnerAdapter)` and every async adapter method on that mock is an `AsyncMock`, while `generate_worker_id` remains a plain sync `Mock`. Also updated `tests/scripts/test_debug_services.py` to monkeypatch `create_worker_spawner(...)` instead of the removed `create_runpod_client(...)`, and removed `gpu_orchestrator.runpod_client` from `tests/test_module_import_coverage.py` after deleting the compatibility facade `gpu_orchestrator/runpod_client.py`. Verification: `rg -n "create_runpod_client|RunpodClient" . -g '*.py'` returned no matches; `rg -n "gpu_orchestrator\.runpod\.(api|client|lifecycle|storage|ssh)|from gpu_orchestrator\.runpod import|from gpu_orchestrator\.runpod\." . -g '*.py'` now returns only the intentional `startup_script` imports in `gpu_orchestrator/worker_spawner.py` and `tests/gpu_orchestrator/runpod/test_startup_script.py`; `ls` confirmed only `__init__.py`, `startup_script.py`, and the template remain under `gpu_orchestrator/runpod/`, while only `test_startup_script.py` remains under `tests/gpu_orchestrator/runpod/`; and `python -m py_compile gpu_orchestrator/runpod/__init__.py tests/gpu_orchestrator/control/phases/test_lifecycle.py tests/scripts/test_debug_services.py tests/test_module_import_coverage.py` exited 0.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `gpu_orchestrator/runpod/{api,client,lifecycle,storage,ssh}.py` are deleted, `startup_script.py` is retained, and `gpu_orchestrator/runpod/__init__.py` now re-exports only `startup_script`. The obsolete runpod tests were deleted while `tests/gpu_orchestrator/runpod/test_startup_script.py` was kept. `tests/gpu_orchestrator/control/phases/test_lifecycle.py` now uses `Mock(spec=WorkerSpawnerAdapter)` with `AsyncMock` for the async adapter methods and a plain `Mock` for `generate_worker_id`. The `create_runpod_client` / `RunpodClient` grep is empty after deleting the legacy facade and updating the remaining supporting tests.
